content.full_text:
July 17, 2000

Jeff Morgan
For The North Crane Neighborhood Association
903 North Crane Avenue
St. Helena, CA 94574

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our File No. G-00-152

Dear Mr. Morgan:

Your letter requesting advice under the Political Reform Act was received on July 3, 2000 by the Fair Political Practices Commission.

The Political Reform Act (the "Act") requires the Commission to provide formal written advice to any person whose duties under the Act are in question or to that person's authorized representative. (Section 83114(b).) The Commission does not provide advice to third parties regarding a public official's duties under the Act. (2 Cal. Code of Regs. Section 18329(b)(8), copy enclosed.) Consequently, we are unable to provide assistance with respect to the issues you raise in your letter.

If you have any further questions regarding this matter, please feel free to contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Lynda Doherty
Political Reform Consultant

LD:klw

1 Government Code Section 81000 - 91015.
